name: Mickey Hart
abstract: Mickey Hart (born Michael Steven Hartman, September 11, 1943) is an American percussionist. He is best known as one of the two drummers of the rock band Grateful Dead.

concerts.label: Folkways at 50: An Anniversary Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: Zakir Hussain Eternal: Celebrating 75 Years of Genius
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Louie Bellson
about_quotes.evidence: He’s been like a brother to me. He’s been my best man at my wedding here at Emmanuel Baptist Church. We still do a lot of things together.
about_quotes.doc_title: Louie Bellson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
